title: Deepinder Goyal's Temple claims discovery of biomarker that calculates cost of being alive; here’s what it means
summary: Deepinder Goyal's startup Temple has unveiled 'Entropy,' a new biomarker measured on the temple region to quantify the real-time cost of being alive. title: Telegram ban: Delhi HC upholds India's temporary ban on WhatsApp rival ahead of NEET re-test
summary: The Delhi High Court has backed the government's decision to temporarily restrict Telegram access until June 22. This measure aims to stop the spread of fake NEET 2026 re-examination papers and related fraud. The government cited Telegram's architecture as a challenge for law enforcement. The Nation
